name: freeside-mediums
description: Sealed Effect Schema registry for chat-medium presentation capabilities. The L2 boundary layer between L1 character config and L3 cmp-boundary transforms — answers 'what can THIS chat medium render?' for Discord, CLI, Telegram, and future surfaces. Cross-repo consumed by freeside-characters/persona-engine, freeside-quests/discord-renderer, loa-finn/cli surface.
